content.title: Taking Turns with My Thomas Trains
content.interest_theme: Thomas the Tank Engine (Gordon and Percy)

scenes.text: I like playing with Thomas trains. My favorites are Gordon and Percy.
scenes.illustration_note: Photo of Jaylen's Thomas trains — Gordon (blue) and Percy (green)

scenes.text: Sometimes my friend wants to play with the trains too.
scenes.illustration_note: Photo of peer sitting nearby, looking at trains

scenes.text: My friend feels happy when they get a turn with the trains.
scenes.illustration_note: Photo of smiling peer holding a train

scenes.text: I can give my friend a train and count to 5. Then it is my turn again.
While I wait, I can squeeze my hands together or use my chew tube.
scenes.illustration_note: Photo of hand squeeze and chew tube

scenes.text: When my friend gives the train back, I feel good. We played together!
scenes.illustration_note: Photo of both children with trains, side by side

scenes.text: Taking turns makes playtime fun for everyone. Gordon and Percy like having more friends on the track.
scenes.illustration_note: Photo of trains on track together
